title: QSMP Egg Plushies
description: Custom model resource pack adding plushies of the egg characters from the QSMP
body:
Becca's QSMP egg plushies pack! Made for 2 year anniversary since the start of the QSMP! Here our all our favorite eggs to celebrate!

Check the gallery for the models! 

Version 1.0 was made for vanilla custom models, and should work for 1.14-1.21.1. However, it is NOT survival friendly, the items must be accessed through commands (below).
Version 1.1 was made with the item components system, and will work for 1.21.2+. It still may need commands to access the custom items (below x2).
It is only survival friendly for 1.21.5, due to the code only being added in this version.
It is unknown if this will work for mods such as Optifine or CIT Resewn, I did not make these with those mods in mind.

**Item Model IDs: needed for Version 1.0 (1.14-1.21.1!)**

Desired Item - block (#)

Use the command: /give @p block[​custom_model_data:#]

_If you have a way of putting one of these items on your head, they will appear to be sitting on it!_

- white wool (1) - Template / Unnamed Egg
- white wool (2) - Chayenne
- white wool (3) - Dapper
- white wool (4) - Leo
- white wool (5) - Bobby
- white wool (6) - Tilín
- white wool (7) - Ramón
- white wool (8) - JuanaFlippa
- white wool (9) - Trumpet
- white wool (10) - Pomme
- white wool (11) - Talullah
- white wool (12) - Richalryson
- white wool (13) - SunnySideUp
- white wool (14) - Empanada
- white wool (15) - Pepito
- white wool (16) - 춘식 "Chunsik"
- white wool (17) - Hope

**Item Components - Survival-Friendly Renaming:** for 1.21.5+

Rename WHITE WOOL to one of the following names (alternate names should link to the same model):
- Chayenne Plush
- Dapper Plush
- Leo Plush
- Bobby Plush
- Tilin Plush
- Tilín Plush
- Ramon Plush
- Ramón Plush
- JuanaFlippa Plush
- Trumpet Plush
- Pomme Plush
- Talullah Plush
- Richalryson Plush
- Richas Plush
- SunnySideUp Plush
- Sunny Plush
- Empanada Plush
- Pepito Plush
- Chunsik Plush
- 춘식 Plush
- Hope Plush

**Item Components - Command Summoning:** for 1.21.2-1.21.4, and to apply further item components for customizability 1.21.5+

/give @p ANY_ITEM_YOU_WANT[item_model:"becca:json_filename"]
- eggtemplateplush
- eggchayenneplush
- eggdapperplush
- eggleoplush
- eggbobbyplush
- eggtilinplush
- eggramonplush
- eggjuanaflippaplush
- eggtrumpetplush
- eggpommeplush
- eggtalullahplush
- eggrichasplush
- eggsunnysideupplush
- eggempanadaplush
- eggpepitoplush
- eggchunsikplush
- egghopeplush

I do NOT plan to add any more QSMP eggs to this pack. Gegg wasn't a real egg and Nacho was created during the egg actor's strike and technically could be considered a scab. Please don't ask for additions! This was originally made before the announcement of QSMP2 or any potential drama and is dedicated to the egg actors who brought these characters to life.

You may use the blank egg model to make custom eggs if desired! Please just credit my original pack as the base.
